Home.heroSubtitle: Stop watching, start playing. Backing & Score is your ultimate play-along library and interactive academy. Play your favorite tracks or master your instrument with real-time pitch detection.
Home.waitModeDesc: Enter Acapella Practice. In Wait Mode, backing tracks are muted so you can focus entirely on your instrument. Connected via Microphone or MIDI, our Audio Engine analyzes your pitch in real-time. The sheet music only advances when you play the exact correct note.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Be among the first to experience the ultimate interactive play-along platform.
Home.f2Desc: Say goodbye to passive video lessons. Step into our Academy and learn from world-class creators through truly interactive courses. The curriculum drops you right into the sheet music, scoring your performance progressively as you learn.
Home.f3Desc: Every song in our library is a professional multi-track recording. Want to practice the Piano part? Just mute the Piano stem to isolate the band, and you become the star player. You have full control over the studio mix.
Home.ctaSubtitleFull: Be among the first to experience the ultimate interactive play-along platform.
Home.footerCopy: © 2026 Backing & Score. The Interactive Music Network.

Academy.welcomeTitle: Welcome to the Backing Score Academy
Academy.welcomeSubtitle: Interactive courses combining rigorous music theory with live web-audio validation. Pluck a note. Crush the Wait Mode. Level up your skills.
Academy.noCoursesSubtitle: Creators are hard at work building new curriculums.
Academy.defaultCourseDesc: Master the foundations of musical physics entirely in your browser.

Dashboard.verifyEmailPrompt: Please verify your email address to secure your account. We sent a link to {email}.
Dashboard.manageProjects: Manage and perform your Backing & Score projects.
Dashboard.noProjectsCreator: Create your first project to start mixing backing tracks with sheet music.
Dashboard.noProjectsUser: You do not currently have creator privileges to upload projects.
Dashboard.deleteConfirmDesc: Delete this project? This cannot be undone.

Login.subtitle: Log in to your Backing & Score account

Guide.heroSubtitle: Welcome to the ultimate hub for modern musicians and educators. Learn how to practice with Wait Mode, navigate Interactive Courses, and create your own Masterclasses using our proprietary audio engine.
Guide.s1Body: The Discover page is your infinite library of Singles and Albums. Connect your Microphone or MIDI Keyboard and let the Audio Engine track your playing. Activate Wait Mode to mute the backing tracks and enter pure Acapella practice.
Guide.s1WaitNote: Waiting for exact note to continue...
Guide.s2Body: The Academy provides structured curriculum designed by professional educators. Lessons integrate Rich-Text instructions directly alongside the interactive sheet music player.
Guide.s3Body: Teachers and Publishers can digitize PDF curriculum into interactive apps in minutes. Insert MusicXML files as native blocks. Toggle Wait Mode Required to enforce grading.
Guide.s4Body: Every song on Backing & Score is a multi-track recording. If you play Guitar, simply open the Mixer and MUTE the Lead Guitar stem.
